name: Toffee Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until the mixture forms a fine powder.
3. Add 1 to 2 teaspoons of the powder to 1 cup of hot water (or more for larger quantities).
4. Enjoy your homemade Toffee Coffee, which is approximately one-third the cost of store-bought versions.
Note: Twin extracts contain 16 teaspoons per cup. You can also use decaffeinated coffee if desired.
